name: Homemade Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Knead the dough thoroughly on a floured surface for about 30 minutes.
3. Divide into balls and pass through a noodle machine, or roll out by hand using a rolling pin on a floured board.
4. Roll out as thinly as possible. Allow noodles to dry for an hour or two on each side before cutting into strips.
